title: Eva Movies Groundwork books question for Reichu
display_title: Eva Movies Groundwork books question for Reichu
wikitext:
[]: Eva Movies Groundwork books question for Reichu             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 27, 2006 1:07 am *whew* Long title! Anyway, Reichu, I was wondering if you could post the pictures from this thread on the site? The information you wrote about Kaji/Misato and Shinji/Asuka as well as their respective *ahem* postions interguies me (trying not to let my inner prevert show. 8) ) http://www.animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=126071&page=3 I stumbled across that page when looking for info/scans of the Movie books (I'm guessing they aren't released in America, huh??)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Dec 27, 2006 1:31 am Yes, that thead looks quite interesting, yet all the images are broken and the link to a gallery of the first two books looks like it no longer has them. :( I'm curious as to why they went through all the trouble to map out the characters' coital positions that you barely see, yet they don't bother keeping the Evas' size consistent. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 27, 2006 1:33 am most of those images are on the commentary site under supplimental images: http://www.evacommentary.org/images_production/groundwork_m26_C196_top.gif http://www.evacommentary.org/images_production/groundwork_m26_C196_bottom.gif the one of Kaji and Misato isn't there tho

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Dec 27, 2006 1:38 am Ornette: I tried the "Asuka no mune" picture, it didn't work, and I gave up. :? http://gh.ffshrine.org/art.php This site appears to have scans of volumes one and two. :) EDIT: But MAN, is it TEDIOUS to view!!! 'NOTHER EDIT: It also appears to have the Newtype gallery, Der Mond and "Stripping Instrumentality Project", the last of which is something I've never heard of before now. THIRD EDIT: Oh. The reason for that is probably because it's an unofficial hentai. :? ONE MORE FINAL: http://www.nihon-anime.com/v3/index.php?page=artboook has the two groundworks and two artbooks in convenient-to-download ZIP files.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 27, 2006 2:15 am I went to all those sites already, I'm speciefically looking for any of the Groundwork Movie stuff, but thanks for looking so far!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 30, 2006 1:48 am NAveryW wrote: Ornette: I tried the "Asuka no mune" picture, it didn't work, and I gave up. :?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 30, 2006 2:14 am Seeing as I was just listening for the first time to Asuka's Death from S2 Works (essietnally a spiritual/religous version (think funeral march type music) of Thanatos; but it was so "heavy" it was making my stomach hurt (even Munashii Nigare isn't as heavy!) So what if I'm 21? Is it wrong I get affected so emotionally by music? :oops: are there any groundwork images of what that sequence would have been or anything from Last A & Last B?? Or the layout for what we ended up getting final scene-wise? *giggles at Reichu's piracy song* Did you hear about that new Pirate Movie? It's rated....ARRRRR!' Those stripping Insturmenality Project pics are interesting, everyone besides Shinji looks normal! He looks like he's straight out of a shota! :shock: (At least, from what I've seen: the three main females (we need some nickname to describe those 3 collectively....Misato, Asuka and Rei is a bitch to type out. *thinks* Triad of girls??) , Kaworu and Shinji) Still skimming thru S2 Works...Disc 7, 16) M-10's interesting...No Intro. O_O (Komm susser...) Can't wait to see what "Theme of Love" is (curious.) Whoops, sorry about my OT-ness. ^^;

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Dec 30, 2006 2:25 am Oh, that was referring to the "Shinji Wants Boobies" the whole time. For some reason, it never occurred to me that that picture was of Asuka... And that picture of Misato and Kaji cracked me up when I saw Misato's face in the second diagram. XD It makes me wonder if they took the project entirely seriously. :P Now I have "You are a Pirate" stuck in my head again. EDIT: Oh yeah, and... Stripping Instrumentality Project is OFFICIAL?!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 30, 2006 2:30 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: are there any groundwork images of what that sequence would have been or anything from Last A & Last B?? Or the layout for what we ended up getting final scene-wise?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 30, 2006 2:39 am Nice song. ;) MAR. (Or ARM, or RAM.)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 30, 2006 4:28 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: With Last A and Last B, I guess what threw me off that there was something else or more images-wise was this (espeically because the link MD Wigs-sama gave

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 30, 2006 12:18 pm *shudders* Why Anno? *twitch* Seriously though, maybe it symbolizes how Shinji's personality is on the feminine side despite him being a guy? ...Or Anno-sensei's just a prev. Thanks for the scan; fun stuff. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Dec 30, 2006 1:59 pm Perv rhymes with Nerv, and that's good enough for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 30, 2006 3:53 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: *shudders* Why Anno? *twitch*

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Dec 30, 2006 5:34 pm The only thing that I could ever figure was that it was just something there to be subliminally disturbing. I didn't catch it until several viewings in, and when I did, it was the hugest WTF moment I'd seen of Eva, which was really saying something.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Dec 30, 2006 5:45 pm Reichu wrote: Ixnay. "Nerv" is German, not the English word "nerve".

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Fri Jan 26, 2007 9:05 am Its more like "nerf" . Nerf Nerv becus they pwned what the army couldn't pwn... It's right. NERV =NERF

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Fri Jan 26, 2007 11:01 am More like n-air-ph, if I remeber correctly. Not sure, would have to have someone confirm it.

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Mon Jan 29, 2007 12:13 pm Omega, nice avatar
